speaker_notes.key_message: Open with the real aim: help Chleo test and launch a studio without rushing into lease risk.
talk_track: This is a practical launch proposal, not only a mood board.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Start with Chleo's dream and the risk of moving too fast.

visual_aid.purpose: Poster-style studio switch visual introduces the room as inviting but controlled.

motion.purpose: Keep the opening title stable for presenter mode.

speaker_notes.key_message: The recommendation is staged: customers, permission, quotes, then lease.
talk_track: Frame this as risk control, not pessimism.
speaker_notes.transition_in: After the title, set the decision rule.
avoid_saying: A lease is the first milestone

visual_aid.purpose: Three-step gate makes the launch order unmistakable.

motion.purpose: Reveal the launch gates in order.

speaker_notes.key_message: Launch as a private rehearsal and learning room, not as a public gig venue.
talk_track: This boundary keeps the first version focused and easier to approve.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Move from recommendation to product scope.
speaker_notes.transition_out: Explain why the market gap is trust.
avoid_saying: Open public shows from day one

visual_aid.purpose: Four mode cards define what the first room is allowed to be.

motion.purpose: Show modes as separate operating uses.

slides.title: The gap is trust.
body: Chleo should compete on reliability, teacher-readiness and beginner-safe standards.

speaker_notes.key_message: Price is not the wedge; trust is.
talk_track: Use the price benchmarks to show Chleo should not race to the bottom.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Now explain the market opening.
speaker_notes.transition_out: Show how to find early users.

visual_aid.purpose: Price cards and trust cards contrast existing market price with differentiation.

speaker_notes.key_message: This is customer discovery and market validation, not sales.
talk_track: Count named people or groups only when they give contact, use case, usual slot, budget and next action.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Move from market gap to sourcing.

visual_aid.purpose: Customer-discovery funnel splits early demand into three concrete user pools.

speaker_notes.key_message: Do not ask people to prepay for a room they cannot see.
talk_track: Validate with pencil-in slots, paid test sessions in an existing studio, then small refundable waitlist deposits after a credible preview.
speaker_notes.transition_in: After finding leads, define the validation ladder.

visual_aid.purpose: Ticket cards show a believable path from interest to commitment.

motion.purpose: Reveal commitment types one by one.

speaker_notes.key_message: Property scouting starts with a written use case and written answers, not viewings.
talk_track: Ask agents and landlords about use, sound, fitout, evening access, AC and exits before spending time on site visits.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Move from customer demand to site risk.

visual_aid.purpose: Four-step scouting flow gives Chleo a concrete real-estate process.

motion.purpose: Reveal the property process in order.

rows: Cleaner fit for lessons and service use
Can be cheaper and more tolerant

speaker_notes.key_message: Commercial units are usually cleaner for this concept; cheaper sites need more checks.
talk_track: The right site is not just the cheapest rent.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Compare the shortlisted site categories.
speaker_notes.transition_out: Show how use changes licensing risk.

visual_aid.purpose: Property comparison table makes tradeoffs explicit.

rows: Commercial school or music school fit

speaker_notes.key_message: Private use is the launch path; public showcases should wait.
talk_track: This is the legality slide that prevents the deck from overpromising.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Move from location to operating use.

visual_aid.purpose: Legal matrix separates private rehearsal, lessons, workshops and public shows.

slides.title: Treatment is not isolation.
body: Isolation stops sound leaving the room.

speaker_notes.key_message: The cost jump happens when isolation is required.
talk_track: This distinction makes the acoustic budget more honest.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Move from legal use to sound risk.
speaker_notes.transition_out: Translate sound risk into build layers.

visual_aid.purpose: Two sound panels separate room sound from sound leakage.

speaker_notes.key_message: Quote the room in layers before signing.
talk_track: Layer 2 is not assumed; it depends on site noise and construction assessment.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Show how the acoustic distinction becomes a fitout plan.
speaker_notes.transition_out: Move from room works to equipment.

visual_aid.purpose: Layer cards show how costs escalate only when the site requires it.

motion.purpose: Reveal layers from low risk to high cost.

slides.title: Buy durable workhorse gear.
body: Pearl Export or Yamaha Stage Custom class kit
Behringer XR18 or Yamaha MG-class mixer

speaker_notes.key_message: Buy reliable shared-room gear, not boutique gear.
talk_track: The appendix gives model families and buying checks. Quote current stock and warranty before buying.
speaker_notes.transition_in: After fitout, show the buy sheet.
speaker_notes.transition_out: Show what quotes are needed before signing.

visual_aid.purpose: Equipment matrix gives model families, starter categories and planning ranges.

motion.purpose: Reveal gear categories in a buy-sheet order.

speaker_notes.key_message: Chleo needs written quotes and written approval paths before signing.
talk_track: The quote slide names who to call. The appendix expands it into a call sheet with written outputs.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Turn equipment and fitout into vendor calls.
avoid_saying: A rough verbal estimate is enough

visual_aid.purpose: Six quote cards make the due-diligence contact list concrete.

motion.purpose: Reveal quote groups as a checklist.

speaker_notes.key_message: The bars share one S$0 to S$290k axis.
talk_track: This fixes the earlier misleading cost visual and keeps the ranges honest.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Move from quote categories to cash envelope.

visual_aid.purpose: Common-axis range bars compare launch options fairly.

motion.purpose: Reveal ranges from lowest to highest commitment.

slides.title: Break-even sets the floor.
body: Use the S$6.5k/month fixed-cost example before founder salary.
Divide fixed cost by paid booked hours to get the minimum average hourly revenue.
Test S$50-S$65/hr blended revenue before signing an owned-room lease.

speaker_notes.key_message: Pricing should start from the break-even floor, then be checked against market rates and paid-hour reality.
talk_track: The chart uses S$6.5k/month as an illustrative fixed cost before founder salary.
Divide that monthly cost by paid booked hours to get the minimum average hourly revenue.
At 80 paid hours/month the room needs about S$81/hr, which is hard for a budget-friendly room.
At 140 paid hours/month the floor falls to about S$46/hr, making a S$50-S$65 blended launch price more realistic.
Before signing, Chleo should add founder pay, repair reserve and GST where applicable, then test whether the market accepts the price.
speaker_notes.transition_in: After startup cash, explain monthly pressure.
speaker_notes.transition_out: Move to culture and operating standards.
avoid_saying: This is a guaranteed revenue forecast

visual_aid.purpose: Break-even bars show how paid booked hours change the minimum hourly revenue floor.

speaker_notes.key_message: A friendly room still needs operating standards.
talk_track: These rules protect gear, neighbours, teachers, parents and collaborators.
speaker_notes.transition_in: After the business model, define the culture.

visual_aid.purpose: Rules grid makes the room feel friendly but disciplined.

motion.purpose: Reveal operating rules as a standard.

speaker_notes.key_message: The sprint has overlapping workstreams and concrete outputs.
talk_track: The Gantt view shows Chleo does not wait for one phase to fully end before starting the next, but the lease decision still comes last.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Move from standards to execution.

visual_aid.purpose: Gantt-style week grid shows overlap across discovery, pilot, site screening, quote collection and decision memo.

speaker_notes.key_message: The dream moves forward only when the evidence gates pass.
talk_track: This closing keeps the pitch supportive and disciplined.
speaker_notes.transition_in: End with the decision rule.
speaker_notes.transition_out: Invite Chleo to start with validation, not lease signing.

visual_aid.purpose: Five go/no-go gates close the pitch with an action standard.

speaker_notes.key_message: Model examples are buying anchors, not mandatory SKUs.
talk_track: Quote current stock, warranty, delivery and setup before buying.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Appendix for gear questions.

visual_aid.purpose: Gear table gives model examples, quote targets and watch-outs.

rows: Pearl Export or Yamaha Stage Custom class kit
Shell packs may exclude cymbals and good heads
Fender Rumble / Ampeg Rocket class combo or DI plus monitor
Behringer XR18 or Yamaha MG-class mixer, Shure SM58-class mics
Budget for stands, cables and spares
DI boxes, stands, power strips, labels and toolkit

speaker_notes.key_message: Collect written outputs, not verbal estimates.
talk_track: This is the contact plan behind the quote slide.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Appendix for vendor calls.

visual_aid.purpose: Quote call sheet names contacts, asks and written outputs.

rows: Architect, PE, ACMV or renovation contractor
SCDF trigger, doors, ceiling, AC and exits
Use, sound, evening access and reinstatement
Swee Lee, Luther, City Music, Yamaha

speaker_notes.key_message: The startup ranges are made from visible cost buckets.
talk_track: These are planning ranges, not quotes. The owned-room column sums to S$66k-S$135k.
speaker_notes.transition_in: Appendix for cost detail.

visual_aid.purpose: Cost breakdown table shows what is inside each launch range.
